shorts.description: Over ten years since the last episode, ‘The Office US’ is still one of the all-time favorites. This mockumentary about the oddball staff at Dunder Mifflin in Scranton, Pennsylvania, first hit screens in 2005 and stuck around for nine seasons, wrapping up in 2…

shorts.title: Parishioners practice Easter weekend traditions
shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Parishioners gathered Friday at the Cathedral of Saint Peter in Scranton to observe Good Friday, marking the crucifixion and death of Jesus Christ. The day was defined by silence and reflection as the community began its primary Easter weekend traditions. The service is considered one of the most holy days [...]
shorts.content: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Parishioners gathered Friday at the Cathedral of Saint Peter in Scranton to observe Good Friday, marking the crucifixion and death of Jesus Christ. The day was defined by silence and reflection as the community began its primary Easter weekend traditions. The service is considered one of the most holy days [...]
